hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
tool_input = data.get('tool_input', {})
file_path = tool_input.get('file_path', '')
if 'SKILL.md' not in file_path:
    sys.exit(0)
folder = os.path.basename(os.path.dirname(file_path))
try:
    with open(file_path) as f:
        lines = f.read().split('\\n')
    name_line = next((l for l in lines if l.startswith('name:')), '')
    name = name_line.replace('name:', '').strip().strip('\"')
    if not name:
        print('\u26a0\ufe0f  SKILL.md: name: field missing')
    elif folder == name:
        print(f'\u2705 SKILL.md name match: {name}')
    else:
        print(f'\u274c SKILL.md name mismatch: folder={folder} name={name}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'\u26a0\ufe0f  Could not validate SKILL.md: {e}')
"
